title: Manitowoc 2250 – Annual Inspection and Load Test
description: Full annual inspection per ASME B30.5. Load test at 125% rated capacity – passed. Wire rope inspection – main hoist rope replaced at 18 months service. All sheaves lubricated. Boom chord and lattice inspection – no cracks or deformation found. All safety devices tested – operational.

title: CAT 349 – 1000 Hour Service
description: Engine oil and filter change. Hydraulic filter replacement. Fuel system service. Undercarriage inspection – track pads at 55% remaining. Swing bearing greased. All fluid levels checked and topped. Final drive oil sample sent for analysis. All systems operational.

title: Wirtgen W 210 – Cutting Drum Replacement
description: Cutting drum teeth worn to minimum spec after Runway 17 full-depth reclamation. Full drum replacement with 180-tooth reconfiguration for PCC milling. Drum bearing inspected and replaced. Conveyor belt inspection – no damage.

title: Grove RT880E – 500 Hour PM
cost: and filter service. Outrigger pad inspection – replaced two pads. Boom wear pads replaced. Crane certification current – ANSI B30.5 load chart verified and in cab. All safety devices and limit switches tested operational.
